description:
To properly set the group owner of /var/log/cloud-init.log*, run the command: 
$ sudo chgrp adm /var/log/cloud-init.log*
or 
$ sudo chgrp root /var/log/cloud-init.log*
rationale:
The <tt>/var/log/cloud-init.log*</tt> file contains detailed debugging information that
helps users troubleshoot cloud-init and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
ocil_clause:
/var/log/cloud-init.log* does not have a group owner of
adm or
root
ocil:
To check the group ownership of /var/log/cloud-init.log*, run the command: 
$ ls -lL /var/log/cloud-init.log*
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following group-owner: adm or root
title: Verify Group Who Owns /var/log/cloud-init.log* File
